What are the conditions for the obligation of Zakah?. 591 How should one take out the Zakah on monthly salaries? .. - 593 Is it obligatory to pay Zakah on the wealth of a child and an insane

What is the ruling on the Zakah of a 1 debt? . . 595 Should a deceased person’s debt be paid if he has not left any Zakah?.. 596 Is it correct for a person who is in debt to give charity? And what legal

obligations are lifted from the debtor?.. A person did not pay Zakah for four years; what is incumbent on him?.. Is there any Zakah on livestock which are fed for half of the year: How can J know when the Nisab has been reached or it has not been

What is the Nisab of gold and silver? And what is the equivalent of the

A man has daughters and he gave them jewelry. Is all of the jewelry If a man gave his Zakah to one who deserves it, then the one : who took it gave it to him as a gift, should he accept it? ..

Is it permissible for a person to pay something other than money as Zakah on his wealth, such as clothing and the like? .. - 602 If there were diamonds and the like with the gold, how can the Zakah What is the ruling on spending Zakah on the building of Masids? And who is the Fagir 1s Zakah incumbent upon cars used as taxis and private cars? 603 What is the ruling on the Zakah of a rented house? .. -. 604 A person bought some Jand to live on it, after three years, he made the intention to use it for trade. Is there any Zakah on past years? .. 605 Ruling on paying Zakatul-Fitr during the first ten days of Ramadan . 605 Is it permissible to increase the Zakatul-Fitr payment with the intention of giving a voluntary charity? Some scholars say that it is not permissible to give Zakatul. Fitr in the form of rice. What is Your Eminence’s view: - 607 If a person had a one third share of a deceased person's will, and Dirhams belonging to orphans, is there Zakah due on them?.

Seorang pria memiliki anak-anak perempuan dan ia memberi mereka perhiasan. Apakah semua perhiasan itu Jika seseorang memberikan zakahnya kepada orang yang berhak menerimanya, kemudian orang yang menerimanya memberikannya kembali sebagai hadiah, apakah ia boleh menerimanya? ..

Apakah diperbolehkan bagi seseorang untuk membayar sesuatu selain uang sebagai zakah atas hartanya, seperti pakaian dan semisalnya? .. - 602 Jika terdapat berlian dan sejenisnya bersama emas, bagaimana zakah Apa hukum membelanjakan zakah untuk pembangunan masjid? Dan siapa yang dimaksud faqir Apakah zakah wajib atas mobil yang digunakan sebagai taksi dan mobil pribadi? 603 Apa hukum zakah rumah yang disewakan? .. -. 604 Seseorang membeli sebidang tanah untuk ditinggali, setelah tiga tahun, ia berniat menggunakannya untuk perdagangan. Apakah ada zakah atas tahun-tahun yang telah berlalu? .. 605 Hukum membayar Zakatul-Fitri pada sepuluh hari pertama Ramadan . 605 Apakah diperbolehkan menambah pembayaran Zakatul-Fitri dengan niat memberikan sedekah sunnah? Sebagian ulama mengatakan bahwa tidak diperbolehkan memberikan Zakatul-Fitri dalam bentuk beras.
